meta.title: Sourcing & Shipping Services | aws overseas
meta.description: Explore aws overseas's full range of services — Product Sourcing, Supplier Verification, and Quality Inspection in India, paired with Air Freight, Sea Freight, Import & Export, Customs Clearance, and Door-to-Door delivery.

hero.title: From Finding a Manufacturer to Shipping — One Service Line
hero.subtitle: aws overseas sources and verifies manufacturers in India, inspects goods before dispatch, and manages the air freight, sea freight, and customs clearance that gets them to your door. Sourcing and shipping, run as one process.

overview.title: Sourcing and Freight, Scoped to Your Order
overview.description: aws overseas manages both halves of an export order: finding and verifying the right manufacturer in India, and moving the finished goods to your destination. Our team inspects before dispatch, files the export documentation, and coordinates freight and customs clearance, so nothing falls between a sourcing agent and a freight forwarder.

airFreight.title: Air Freight
airFreight.description: For businesses that can't wait on a shipping schedule, we get product out of India and into your market fast — so you can hit a launch date, restock before you sell out, or fill an order your customer needs now.

seaFreight.title: Sea Freight
seaFreight.description: For orders where margin matters more than speed, we move product in volume at the lowest landed cost — planned, containerized, and timed so your inventory lands exactly when your business needs it.

importServices.title: Import Services
importServices.description: We help businesses source and import from India without opening a local office to do it — finding the right product, moving it through customs, and getting it into your hands ready to sell.

exportServices.title: Export Services
exportServices.description: We take an order from factory floor to foreign port: coordinating with your manufacturer, filing the paperwork that clears customs, checking quality before it ships, and getting it moving.

warehousing.title: Warehousing & Distribution
warehousing.description: When your order comes from more than one supplier, we hold and manage the inventory in India — consolidating shipments from multiple factories into one packed, labeled, ready-to-ship load instead of several.

customsClearance.title: Custom Clearance
customsClearance.description: Customs holds are the most common reason an export order stalls. We prepare the export documentation, classify goods under the correct HS codes, and manage compliance so your shipment clears without delay.

sourcingAgent.title: Sourcing Partner
sourcingAgent.description: This is where an export order actually begins. aws overseas works as your on-ground partner in India, running every step between an idea and a shipped, export-ready product — so you get the right supplier, the right price, and the right quality, without ever setting foot in the country.

cta.title: Ready to Source & Export from India?
cta.description: Whether you need a manufacturer sourced and verified in India, or cargo moved and cleared through customs, aws overseas scopes it as one export plan.
